name: Cornmeal-Raisin Scones
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Chilled stick margarine, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a bowl and mix with a pastry blender or two knives until the mixture resembles fine meal.
2. Add the margarine cut into small pieces and mix well.
3. Stir in the raisins.
4. Whisk together the buttermilk and egg, then add to the dry ingredients. Mix just until the dry ingredients are moistened (the dough will be sticky).
5. Spoon the dough evenly into five mounds on a baking sheet coated with cooking spray.
6. Bake at 375 degrees for 18 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Serve warm.
